en.title: Siberian Cat Price Guide – What Affects Cost and How to Check Current Prices
en.content:
How to Check the Current Price of a Siberian Kitten

Siberian kitten prices vary by the individual kitten, depending on factors such as pedigree, coat color, sex, age, and health care. For Fuluck Cattery kittens, open the individual kitten page from the available kittens list and check the latest details shown there. If no price is displayed, please ask us on LINE.

Price is only one part of the decision. Also review the parent cats' health information, the kitten's vaccination records, the living environment, and post-adoption support.

Seven Factors That Affect Siberian Kitten Pricing

1. Pedigree and Bloodline

Pedigree registration and the parent cats' lineage can affect pricing.

2. Coat Color and Pattern

Demand varies by coat color and pattern, including Neva Masquerade, silver, and brown tabby.

3. Sex

Pricing may differ by sex and by the breeder's placement conditions.

4. Age

Age, completed care, and the planned handover timing can affect the individual price.

5. Health Care

Relevant genetic testing for parent cats and each kitten's vaccination, microchip, and health-check records should be reviewed as separate records.

6. Breeder Experience

Care standards, socialization, and support after handover can affect the cost of a breeding program.

7. Purchase Source

A pet shop and a breeder provide different information and support. Compare the individual animal's records and terms, not only the displayed price.

Pet Shop and Breeder: What to Compare

FactorPet ShopBreeder Direct
How to check priceCheck the store or individual listingCheck the individual kitten page or ask the breeder
Parent cat informationMay be limitedAsk what can be reviewed during the visit
Living environmentReview the shop's informationReview it during the required on-site visit
After-adoption supportCheck the store's termsCheck the breeder's support terms

Do Not Choose on Price Alone

Confirm the parent cats' relevant genetic-test results, the kitten's vaccination schedule, whether you can see the kitten and living environment in person, and what support is available after handover.

About Fuluck Cattery's Pricing

Fuluck Cattery performs the relevant genetic testing on parent cats. For each kitten, we provide the applicable age-appropriate vaccination record, microchip information, and health-check documentation. Check the individual kitten page and handover documents for what applies to that kitten.

  • Parent-cat genetic-test results
  • Kitten-specific vaccination records
  • Microchip information
  • Kitten-specific health-check records
  • Pedigree documentation where applicable
  • Post-adoption consultation support

View the latest details on each available kitten page, or contact us on LINE if a price is not displayed.

zh.title: 西伯利亚猫价格指南｜价格影响因素与最新价格查询方法
zh.content:
如何查看西伯利亚幼猫的最新价格

西伯利亚幼猫的价格因每只猫而异，会受血统、毛色、性别、月龄和健康管理等因素影响。查看福乐猫舍幼猫时，请从在售幼猫一览打开每只猫咪的页面，确认其中显示的最新信息。如果页面未显示价格，请通过 LINE 咨询。

不要只看价格，还应同时确认亲猫的健康信息、幼猫的疫苗记录、饲养环境以及接猫后的咨询支持。

影响西伯利亚幼猫价格的7个因素

1. 血统与家系

血统登记以及亲猫的家系可能影响价格。

2. 毛色与花纹

涅瓦化装舞会色、银色和棕色虎斑等毛色与花纹的需求各不相同。

3. 性别

价格可能因性别和猫舍的交付条件而异。

4. 月龄

月龄、已完成的健康管理和计划交付时间都会影响个体价格。

5. 健康管理

应将亲猫所需的基因检测，与每只幼猫的疫苗、芯片和健康检查记录分开确认。

6. 猫舍经验

护理标准、社会化和交付后支持都会影响繁育计划的成本。

7. 购买渠道

宠物店和猫舍提供的信息与支持不同，应比较个体记录和条件，而不是只比较标价。

宠物店与猫舍：应该比较什么

项目宠物店猫舍直接交付
价格查询查看店铺或个体页面查看每只幼猫页面或咨询猫舍
亲猫信息可能有限确认参观时可查看的内容
饲养环境查看店铺提供的信息在法律要求的现场参观中确认
交付后支持确认店铺条款确认猫舍的支持范围

不要只看价格

请确认亲猫所需的基因检测结果、幼猫的疫苗计划、是否能现场查看幼猫与饲养环境，以及交付后可获得的支持。

关于福乐猫舍的价格

福乐猫舍会为亲猫进行所需的基因检测。针对每只幼猫，我们会提供该幼猫适用的按月龄疫苗记录、芯片信息和健康检查文件。请通过幼猫个体页面和交付文件确认该幼猫的实际内容。

  • 亲猫的基因检测结果
  • 每只幼猫的疫苗记录
  • 芯片信息
  • 每只幼猫的健康检查记录
  • 适用时的血统文件
  • 交付后的咨询支持

请在每只在售幼猫页面查看最新信息；如果页面未显示价格，欢迎通过 LINE 咨询。
